summary: ANDROID 🟥 CLOUD Unable to remove policies for VFRee 60 + device
scenario: VFree 60+ device missing from Manage -> Policies -> Individual Device list, preventing policy removal
description_clean: When logging into a tenant, the VFree 60+ device is not shown in Manage -> Policies -> Individual Device list, so users cannot set or remove policies for this device. The device appears in the inventory but not in the policy management section. Users can access device settings via inventory but can only set policies there, not remove them. Expected behavior: VFree 60+ should appear in the Individual Device list under Manage -> Policies, allowing users to both set and remove policies.
steps: Navigate to Manage -> Policies -> Individual Device list
Check if VFree 60+ device is listed
expected: VFree 60+ should appear in the Individual Device list under Manage -> Policies, allowing users to both set and remove policies.
actual: VFree 60+ device is not shown in Manage -> Policies -> Individual Device list. The device appears in the inventory but not in the policy management section. Users can access device settings via inventory but can only set policies there, not remove them.
